name: frontier-alpha-mobile-portfolio
description: Mobile portfolio — card/list hybrid that makes 375px usable. Replaces the overflowing desktop table with per-row cards, tap-to-expand via existing BottomSheet, swipe actions, and pull-to-refresh. Preserves the desktop table unchanged.

stories.title: Breakpoint switch — render card layout under 768px
criteria: Portfolio.tsx detects viewport via useMediaQuery('(max-width: 767px)') — no duplicate data fetching
Mobile branch renders PortfolioMobile, desktop branch keeps current table
Same store/hooks feed both — single source of truth
SSR-safe guard (optional since Vite is SPA, but future-proof)
No horizontal scroll at 320px
stories.completionNotes: useIsMobile hook already existed (client/src/hooks/useIsMobile.ts) with matchMedia + SSR-safe guard. Portfolio.tsx already branches at line 380 on isMobile. This story was effectively shipped in a prior sprint; verified and marked done.

stories.title: Position card — symbol, weight, PnL hero, mini sparkline
criteria: Each card: row 1 = symbol (bold, 20px) + weight% (mono, right-aligned), row 2 = PnL$ + PnL% (color-coded), row 3 = sparkline (60x20) spanning the card
Cards separated by 1px border — no drop shadow at this breakpoint
PnL color: var(--color-positive) up, var(--color-negative) down
Sparkline reuses existing svg polyline logic from PositionList — extract to shared Sparkline.tsx
Loading state: skeleton card with shimmer
Touch target ≥44x44 on the main tap zone
stories.completionNotes: Shipped client/src/components/shared/Sparkline.tsx (deterministic SVG, fill+baseline optional) and client/src/components/portfolio/mobile/PositionCard.tsx (3-row layout — symbol+weight / PnL$+PnL% color-coded / sparkline spanning card). When history data is absent, synthesizeHistory generates a stable symbol-seeded walk biased by PnL sign for visual consistency. Wired into Portfolio.tsx mobile branch with Edit/Delete/Why actions in an action strip below the card.

stories.title: Tap card to expand — BottomSheet with full detail
criteria: Tap card opens BottomSheet (existing component) with full position detail
Sheet content: full EquityCurve (80vw), factor exposures mini-chart, cost basis, unrealized PnL, realized PnL, avg fill, last trade, alerts count
Actions in sheet footer: Trade, Add Alert, View Options, Sell — each navigates or opens sub-sheet
Sheet respects safe-area-insets (notch, home indicator)
Swipe-down-to-dismiss gesture — threshold 50% of sheet height
Keyboard/A11y: esc closes, focus moves into sheet on open, returns to card on close

stories.title: Swipe-left actions — Sell / Trade / Alert
criteria: Horizontal swipe-left on card reveals 3 action buttons (Sell, Trade, Alert) sliding in from right
Swipe threshold 25% of card width — below = snap back, above = reveal, past 60% = commit default action (Trade)
Haptic feedback on reveal + commit (navigator.vibrate guarded)
useSwipeActions hook — pointer + touch events, no external lib
Tap outside closes revealed actions
Respects prefers-reduced-motion — falls back to long-press menu

stories.title: Pull-to-refresh — wire existing PullToRefresh
criteria: PullToRefresh wraps the PortfolioMobile list on mobile only
Pull threshold triggers refetch of portfolio + quotes queries
Visual: var(--color-accent) spinner, 'Refreshing…' mono uppercase label
Completes within 3s or shows error toast with retry
Does not interfere with swipe-actions or card-tap gestures
Ignored when any sheet is open

stories.title: Sticky filter + sort bar on scroll
criteria: FilterBar sticky under MarketStatusStrip: sort pills (Weight, PnL$, PnL%, Alpha), filter chip (All / Winners / Losers), search input
Scroll behavior: slides in from top when user scrolls down past 200px, stays visible; hides on scroll-up into hero
Sort updates portfolio list order in-place with 200ms stagger-reorder animation
Search filters positions by symbol substring (case-insensitive)
'Clear filters' X appears when any filter active

stories.title: Mobile bottom tab nav — replaces sidebar
criteria: 5 tabs visible under 768px: Dashboard, Portfolio, Trade, Factors, More
'More' opens a sheet with remaining pages (Options, CVRF, Earnings, Alerts, Backtest, ML, Social, Tax, Settings, Help)
Active tab gets var(--color-accent) tint + top 2px accent bar
Safe-area-inset-bottom padding for iOS home indicator
Sidebar hidden on mobile — no double nav
Transition: slide-up on mount, slide-down on route change
